popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/ENGLISH%20NOBILITY%20MEDIEVAL1.htm#JohnFerrersdied1367A as of 6/18/2016

HAWISE de Muscegros, widow of WILLIAM de Mortimer of Bridgewater, daughter and heiress of …

burialPlace.address: St. Mary Churchyard, English Bicknor, Gloucestershire, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Father: Sir Robert de Muscegros, Constable of Bristol Castle b. c 1252, d. 27 Dec 1280

Mother: unnamed first wife of her father

Hawise de Muscegros was born on 21 December 1276 at of Brewham, Charlton Muscegros, Norton, & Stowell, Somersetshire, England; She was daughter of her father's 1st (unnamed) wife, not Agnes de Ferrers.

She married Sir William de Mortimer, son of Sir Roger de Mortimer, 6th Lord Wigmore, Constable of clun & Herford Castles and Maud de Brewes, before 1297

Hawise de Muscegros married Sir John de Ferrers, 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, son of Sir Robert de Ferrers, 6th Earl Derby and Alianore de Bohun, between 2 February 1298 and 13 September 1300; They had 2 sons (John; & Sir Robert) and 2 daughters (Pernel, wife of Richard de Monmouth; & Eleanor, wife of Sir Thomas de Lathom).

On Ides September, 6 Boniface VIII [13 September, 1300], at Anagni, Pope Boniface VIII granted dispensation, at the king's request, to John de Ferrers, son of the late Robert, earl of Derby, and Hawisia, daughter of the late Robert de Mucegros, knight, to remain in the marriage which they contracted, declaring their past and future offspring legitimate, notwithstanding that Hawisia was espoused to the late William de Mortuomari (Mortimer), who was related to the said John in the third degree of kindred, the marriage not being consummated.

Hawise de Muscegros married Sir John de Bures, son of Sir Robert de Bures and Alice, before 1315; They had 1 daughter (Katherine, wife of Sir Giles de Beauchamp).

Hawise de Muscegros died between 23 June 1340 and 21 December 1350; Buried at church of English Bicknor, Gloucestershire.

«b»Family 1«/b»
Sir William de Mortimer d. c 30 Jun 1297

«b»Family 2«/b»
Sir John de Ferrers, 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley b. 20 Jun 1271, d. c 27 Aug 1312

«b»Children«/b»
1.) John

2.) Sir Robert

3.) Pernel, wife of Richard de Monmouth

4.) Eleanor, wife of Sir Thomas de Lathom

«b»Family 3«/b»
Sir John de Bures d. 21 Dec 1350

«b»Child«/b»
1.) Katherine, wife of Sir Giles de Beauchamp

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Muscegros於大約1276年12月21日出生在英國薩默塞特斯度維爾時，她的父親Robert de Muscegros24歲，母親Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers24歲。她於1301年與John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾恩格列斯 比可諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Muscegros于大约1276年12月21日出生在英国薩默塞特斯度維爾时，她的父亲Robert de Muscegros24岁，母亲Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers24岁。她于1301年与John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾恩格列斯 比可諾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Muscegros was born about 21 December 1276, in Stowell, Somerset, England, her father, Robert de Muscegros, was 24 and her mother, Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers, was 24. She married John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley in 1301, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in England, and was buried in English Bicknor, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Muscegros est née environ 21 décembre 1276, à Stowell, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Muscegros, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley en 1301, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, et a été enterrée à English Bicknor, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Muscegros um 21. Dezember 1276 in Stowell, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Muscegros 24 und ihre Mutter Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers 24. Sie hat 1301 in Staffordshire, England John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in England und wurde in English Bicknor, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Muscegros è nata il circa 21 dicembre 1276 nel Stowell, Somerset, England, sua padre, Robert de Muscegros, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley nel 1301, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel England, e fu sepolta a English Bicknor, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Muscegrosが約1276年12月21日にイギリスソメルセトストウエルで生まれた時，父Robert de Muscegrosは24歳，母Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrersは24歳であった。1301年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJohn de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエングリッシュ ビクノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Muscegros(이)가 대략 1276년 12월 21일 영국 서머세트 스타웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Muscegros(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1301년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 잉글리시 바이c너에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Muscegros nasceu aproximadamente 21 de dezembro de 1276, em Stowell, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Muscegros, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley em 1301, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em English Bicknor, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Muscegros родилась около 21 декабря 1276 г. в местности стоуелл, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Muscegros было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley в 1301 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности Англия и была похоронена в местности энглиш биккнор, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley en 1301, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
